summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WM-Sauna 5 new conversion optimization features. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all features: Social Proof Counters, Model Comparison, Sticky CTA Bar, Floating Contact Widget, and FAQ Section with accordion.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting (<th> inside <span>, <span> inside <tr>) - these are React hydration warnings from the dynamic table rendering but don't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/settings/social-proof returns social proof settings with 4 items (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings/social-proof requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings/social-proof saves settings with auth (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/settings/faq returns FAQ settings with items (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings/faq requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings/faq saves FAQ settings with auth (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/settings/sections includes 'faq' in section order (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/settings/models returns models config (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/sauna/prices returns models for comparison (200 OK)
Backend: Admin login with correct credentials succeeds (200 OK)
Backend: Admin login with wrong credentials fails (401)
Frontend: Social proof counters display after hero section with animated numbers
Frontend: Social proof shows 4 counters (500+, 98%, 10+, 5-10)
Frontend: Floating contact button visible in bottom-right corner
Frontend: Clicking floating contact toggle shows WhatsApp and Phone options
Frontend: WhatsApp button links to wa.me with correct phone number
Frontend: Phone button links to tel: with correct phone number
Frontend: Sticky CTA bar appears when scrolling past hero
Frontend: Sticky CTA bar has 'Oblicz cenę sauny' button
Frontend: Sticky CTA button scrolls to calculator section
Frontend: Models section has 'Porównaj' compare buttons on each card
Frontend: Clicking compare button adds model to compare bar at bottom
Frontend: Compare bar shows selected models with X buttons and compare button
Frontend: Maximum 3 models can be added to compare (4th click ignored)
Frontend: Compare counter shows '3/3' when max reached
Frontend: Compare button opens comparison table modal with specs side by side
Frontend: Compare modal shows price, capacity, steam room, relax room, variants
Frontend: Compare modal has 'Skonfiguruj' (configure) buttons for each model
Frontend: FAQ section displays with accordion-style questions
Frontend: Clicking FAQ question expands/collapses the answer
Frontend: FAQ section has JSON-LD schema for SEO
Frontend: Admin 'FAQ' tab allows adding/editing/removing FAQ items
Frontend: Admin 'Счётчики' tab allows editing social proof values
Frontend: Admin FAQ and Social Proof save buttons work
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Compare modal table has React hydration warnings due to dynamic rendering of <th> and <td> elements inside map() - consider using React.Fragment or restructuring the table to avoid nesting issues
seed_data_creation: FAQ settings updated during backend tests (restored to original)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 conversion optimization features are fully functional: 1) Social Proof Counters with animated numbers after hero, 2) Model Comparison with max 3 models, floating compare bar, and side-by-side modal, 3) Sticky CTA bar that appears after scrolling past hero and hides near calculator, 4) Floating WhatsApp/Phone contact widget, 5) FAQ accordion with JSON-LD schema. Admin panel has 'FAQ' and 'Счётчики' tabs for managing these features. Backend uses Basic Auth for admin endpoints.

social_proof_counters.details: Displays 4 animated counters after hero section (500+ saunas, 98% satisfaction, 10+ years, 5-10 days). Uses framer-motion useInView for animation trigger.

model_comparison.details: Compare buttons on model cards, floating compare bar at bottom, max 3 models limit enforced, comparison modal with side-by-side specs table and configure buttons.

sticky_cta_bar.details: Fixed bottom bar with 'Oblicz cenę sauny' button appears after scrolling past hero, hides near calculator/contact sections, scrolls to calculator on click.

floating_contact.details: Expandable contact widget in bottom-right with WhatsApp (green, wa.me link) and Phone (dark, tel: link) options. Uses hardcoded phone +48732099201.

faq_section.details: Accordion-style FAQ with expand/collapse animation, JSON-LD FAQPage schema for SEO, managed from admin panel with add/edit/remove functionality.
